vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: I enjoy being the driver as it challenges my spatial awareness, especially when navigating through narrow city streets.
I lean towards being a passenger because I can turn a sedentary journey into a productive one by reading or catching up on emails.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác được làm chủ/tự quyết
vocab.example: Driving provides me with a profound sense of agency, allowing me to dictate the route and make spontaneous detours.
I strictly prefer the driver's seat because it is the most effective way for me to combat my chronic motion sickness.

vocab.meaning: áp lực nhận thức/gánh nặng trí óc
vocab.example: After a grueling day at work, I'd rather be a passenger to reduce my cognitive load and simply enjoy the passing scenery.
